```{r}
#| label: installation-docker
#| results: asis
#| echo: false

glue(
  "
  [![ghcr-latest] ![ghcr-size]](https://github.com/{org_nm}/{pkg_nm}/pkgs/container/{pkg_nm})

  [ghcr-latest]: <https://ghcr-badge.egpl.dev/{org_nm}/{pkg_nm}/latest_tag?color=%2344cc11&ignore=latest&label=version&trim=> \"GHCR latest tag\"
  [ghcr-size]: <https://ghcr-badge.egpl.dev/{org_nm}/{pkg_nm}/size?tag={ver}> \"GHCR image size\"

  The Docker image is available from the GitHub Container Registry at
  <https://github.com/{org_nm}/{pkg_nm}/pkgs/container/{pkg_nm}>.

  ```bash
  docker pull --platform linux/amd64 ghcr.io/{org_nm}/{pkg_nm}:{ver}
  ",
  "```"
)
```
